# Branvoy

> Branvoy is a business development and digital strategy agency based in Sri Lanka, working with clients worldwide. We grow your online presence through strategic social media, content creation, and high-performing websites, so your business grows with it.

## About

- Founded: 2025 by Chameesha Rashani
- Location: Sri Lanka, serving clients worldwide
- Focus: hospitality brands (surf camps, villas, restaurants), personal brands, and growing businesses

## Services

- Business development & digital strategy
- Social media management: 3+ platforms (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok), 2 to 4 posts/reels per week, daily stories, weekly ad campaigns, competitor analysis, monthly reports
- Website design & development: responsive, performance-optimized, booking and inquiry focused, custom features and integrations
- Content creation & photography: on-site photo and video, filming, editing
- Brand identity & product design
- Tech support & account optimization

## Contact
